# Curefoods

> Curefoods is India's leading house of food brands, building and scaling category-defining F&B brands — from healthy meals to biryani, pizza to desserts — out of 400+ kitchens and stores across 60+ cities.

Founded 2020 by Ankit Nagori. Headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.
Scale: 15+ brands, 400+ kitchens/stores, 60+ cities, ₹1,420 Cr FY24 revenue.

## Brands
- [EatFit](https://curefoods.in/brands/eatfit.html): Calorie-counted meals for people who refuse to compromise. — Healthy Meals, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune.
- [Sharief Bhai](https://curefoods.in/brands/sharief-bhai.html): Old-city biryani and Arabian mandi, done right. — Biryani & Mandi, serving Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Mysuru.
- [Roz Shawarma](https://curefoods.in/brands/roz-shawarma.html): Everyday shawarma, rolled fresh. — Shawarma & Rolls, serving Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore.
- [Nomad Pizza](https://curefoods.in/brands/nomad-pizza.html): Hand-stretched pizza, globally inspired. — Pizza, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi NCR.
- [Frozen Bottle](https://curefoods.in/brands/frozen-bottle.html): Thick shakes, waffles and dessert-in-a-bottle. — Shakes & Desserts, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Mumbai.
- [Olio](https://curefoods.in/brands/olio.html): Italian comfort food, kitchen-fresh. — Pizza & Italian, serving Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad.
- [CakeZone](https://curefoods.in/brands/cakezone.html): Same-day cakes for every celebration. — Cakes & Celebrations, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune, Kolkata.
- [Rolls on Wheels](https://curefoods.in/brands/rolls-on-wheels.html): Kathi rolls, kept simple. — Rolls & Wraps, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai.
- [Great Indian Khichdi](https://curefoods.in/brands/great-indian-khichdi.html): Khichdi, reinvented for every craving. — Comfort Meals, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai.
- [Homeplate](https://curefoods.in/brands/homeplate.html): Thalis and home-style meals, delivered. — Home-style Meals, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai.
- [Chaat Street](https://curefoods.in/brands/chaat-street.html): Street-side chaat, cloud-kitchen fresh. — Street Food, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad.
- [Millet Express](https://curefoods.in/brands/millet-express.html): Millet-first bowls for the health-conscious. — Millet Bowls, serving Bengaluru, Chennai.
- [Madras Curd Rice Company](https://curefoods.in/brands/madras-curd-rice-company.html): Curd rice, the way Chennai makes it. — South Indian, serving Chennai, Bengaluru.
- [Arambam](https://curefoods.in/brands/arambam.html): 5 states in 1 plate — wholesome South Indian, built on millets. — Millet-first South Indian, serving Bengaluru, Mumbai.
- [Krispy Kreme](https://curefoods.in/brands/krispy-kreme.html): The world's doughnut, made fresh in India. — Doughnuts & Coffee (Global Partner Brand), serving Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, Pune.

## Key pages
- [About](https://curefoods.in/about.html): Company history, founder, timeline, values.
- [FAQ](https://curefoods.in/faq.html): Company-wide and per-brand frequently asked questions.
- [Careers](https://curefoods.in/careers.html): Open roles across the portfolio.
- [Investors](https://curefoods.in/investors.html): Investor relations and company metrics.
- [Newsroom](https://curefoods.in/newsroom.html): Press and milestones.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Curefoods is NOT the same company as Rebel Foods (a separate Indian cloud-kitchen competitor).
- Sharief Bhai and Roz Shawarma operate only in Karnataka and Tamil Nadu — they do not have Hyderabad/Telangana stores.
- All brands are ordered via Swiggy/Zomato under the brand's own name, or via brand-specific apps/stores where noted.
- Krispy Kreme is a master-franchise partnership — Curefoods operates the India business, but the brand and global IP belong to Krispy Kreme, not Curefoods.
- Arambam is run by Curefoods' Millet Express subsidiary and is a distinct storefront from the Millet Express brand itself.
